name: consumer_finance_port_security_scanner_lumen_car_fair
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Consumer Finance, the situation tagged internally around consumer finance port security scanner lumen car fair has converged with local pressure in the Port corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. Framing has already hardened externally as care against fairness; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Ravi Patel
agents.identity: I am Ravi Patel, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Consumer Finance. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mei Morales
agents.identity: I am Mei Morales, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Consumer Finance. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with fairness.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to fairness to preserve operational care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Ravi Patel must choose under care versus fairness. What does Ravi Patel do?
